nodes.name: models/README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation describing the Hailo HEF model files (MiniLM-L6-v2 quantized for Hailo-8/8L NPU) and how to acquire/place them.

nodes.name: ruvector-hailo/README.md
nodes.summary: Crate-level README for ruvector-hailo describing Hailo NPU integration, CPU fallback, HEF pipeline, and embedder pool usage.

nodes.name: cpu_embedder.rs
nodes.summary: Candle-based CPU fallback embedder using BERT (MiniLM) for sentence embeddings when Hailo NPU is unavailable.

nodes.name: CpuEmbedder
nodes.summary: CPU embedder wrapping Candle BertModel with tokenizer for fallback inference path.

nodes.name: device.rs
nodes.summary: Hailo VDevice handle owning FFI device pointers with Drop cleanup.

nodes.name: HailoDevice
nodes.summary: Wraps a Hailo virtual device pointer with safe creation and Drop-based release.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: Error taxonomy for Hailo backend: device, HEF parsing, inference, tokenizer, and IO failures.

nodes.name: HailoError
nodes.summary: thiserror-derived enum unifying all error variants emitted by the Hailo crate.

nodes.name: hef_embedder_pool.rs
nodes.summary: Mutex-protected pool of HefEmbedder instances enabling concurrent request handling on a single Hailo device.

nodes.name: HefEmbedderPool
nodes.summary: Round-robin pool of HefEmbedder handles for multi-thread access to the Hailo NPU.

nodes.name: hef_embedder.rs
nodes.summary: High-level embedder combining tokenizer, host embedding layer, HEF pipeline, and pooling/normalization stages.

nodes.name: HefEmbedder
nodes.summary: Orchestrates token IDs -> host embeddings -> Hailo pipeline -> mean pool -> L2 normalize.

nodes.name: hef_pipeline.rs
nodes.summary: Low-level HEF inference pipeline wrapping Hailo HRT input/output stream FFI with quantization info.

nodes.name: QuantInfo
nodes.summary: Per-stream quantization parameters (scale, zero point, format) used to encode/decode tensors.

nodes.name: HefPipeline
nodes.summary: Owns Hailo HEF network group, input/output vstreams, and exposes infer_batch with Drop-based cleanup.

nodes.name: hef_verify.rs
nodes.summary: HEF header verification and SHA pinning to detect tampered or mismatched model files.

nodes.name: verify_hef_header_and_pin
nodes.summary: Verifies HEF magic, version, and pinned hash before loading the model onto the NPU.

nodes.name: host_embeddings.rs
nodes.summary: Host-side BERT embeddings + LayerNorm computed via Candle so only transformer body runs on Hailo.

nodes.name: HostEmbeddings
nodes.summary: Loads token/position/type embeddings and LayerNorm weights via Candle VarBuilder.

nodes.name: inference.rs
nodes.summary: Inference utilities: EmbeddingPipeline, mean pooling, and L2 normalization helpers.

nodes.name: EmbeddingPipeline
nodes.summary: End-to-end embedding pipeline coordinating tokenizer + device + post-processing for legacy callers.

nodes.name: mean_pool
nodes.summary: Computes attention-mask-weighted mean pooling over token embeddings.

nodes.name: l2_normalize
nodes.summary: In-place L2 normalization of an embedding vector.

nodes.name: hailo/lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root re-exporting submodules and exposing the unified HailoEmbedder facade plus EmbeddingProvider impl.

nodes.name: HailoEmbedder
nodes.summary: Top-level Hailo embedder that auto-selects HEF or CPU backend at runtime.

nodes.name: HefBackend
nodes.summary: Internal backend discriminator: native Hailo HEF pipeline vs CPU fallback.

nodes.name: tokenizer.rs
nodes.summary: Lightweight WordPiece tokenizer producing EncodedInput with input_ids, attention_mask, token_type_ids.

nodes.name: WordPieceTokenizer
nodes.summary: Pure-Rust WordPiece tokenizer compatible with BERT vocab.txt.

nodes.name: EncodedInput
nodes.summary: Encoded token batch: ids, attention mask, token type ids.

nodes.name: cpu_fallback_integration.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests verifying CpuEmbedder loads and produces sensible embeddings without an NPU.

nodes.name: tokenizer_proptest.rs
nodes.summary: Property-based tests for WordPieceTokenizer using proptest.

nodes.name: ruvector-mmwave/Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the mmwave parsing crate.

nodes.name: ruvector-mmwave/README.md
nodes.summary: README documenting the Seeed MR60BHA1/MR60FDA1 mmWave radar frame parser.

nodes.name: mmwave/lib.rs
nodes.summary: Streaming parser for Seeed MR60 mmWave sensor frames decoding presence/heart/breath events.

nodes.name: Event
nodes.summary: Decoded mmWave radar event variants (presence, heart rate, breath rate, fall, etc.).

nodes.name: Mr60Parser
nodes.summary: Frame-state-machine parser consuming bytes and emitting decoded radar events.

nodes.name: simd_kernels.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for SIMD dot product, ReLU, and AXPY kernels in the CPU backend.

nodes.name: sparse_inference_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks comparing sparse vs dense FFN, predictor, and sparsity levels.

nodes.name: BUILD_STATUS.md
nodes.summary: Build status tracking document for the sparse inference crate.

nodes.name: sparse-inference/Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest declaring features (cpu, wasm, npu), dependencies, and benches for sparse inference.
